channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump remains optimistic despite rain delay at D.C. Freedom 250 event
Newsom criticized for attempting to overshadow Independence Day celebrations
9/11 Museum CEO reflects on terror attacks' lasting impact as America turns 250
item.description: The 9/11 Memorial Museum marks America's 250th anniversary alongside the 25th anniversary of the attacks, emphasizing recovery and resilience.

item.title: New Hampshire's Pine Tree Riots preceded the Boston Tea Party
item.description: Governor Kelly Ayotte notes that the Pine Tree Riot in New Hampshire predated the Boston Tea Party and may have inspired the famous colonial protest.
